Configuration:
    aws:region: us-west-2
  codeinfra:codeinfra:Stack: (same)
    [urn=urn:codeinfra:dev::aws-ts-webserver::codeinfra:codeinfra:Stack::aws-ts-webserver-dev]
    --outputs:--
    publicHostName: "ec2-34-211-56-110.us-west-2.compute.amazonaws.com"
    publicIp      : "34.211.56.110"
      aws:ec2/securityGroup:SecurityGroup: (same)
        [id=sg-07498abcdbdf88f34]
        [urn=urn:codeinfra:dev::aws-ts-webserver::aws:ec2/securityGroup:SecurityGroup::web-secgrp]
        [provider=urn:codeinfra:dev::aws-ts-webserver::codeinfra:providers:aws::default_3_38_1::57baf899-740a-486a-908e-43cf27cce182]
    ++aws:ec2/instance:Instance: (create-replacement)
        [id=i-0207dc7a2d8c5135a]
        [urn=urn:codeinfra:dev::aws-ts-webserver::aws:ec2/instance:Instance::web-server-www]
        [provider=urn:codeinfra:dev::aws-ts-webserver::codeinfra:providers:aws::default_3_38_1::57baf899-740a-486a-908e-43cf27cce182]
      ~ userData: 
            #!/bin/bash
          - echo "Hello, World!" > index.html
          + echo "Hello, Codeinfra!" > index.html
            nohup python -m SimpleHTTPServer 80 &
    +-aws:ec2/instance:Instance: (replace)
        [id=i-0207dc7a2d8c5135a]
        [urn=urn:codeinfra:dev::aws-ts-webserver::aws:ec2/instance:Instance::web-server-www]
        [provider=urn:codeinfra:dev::aws-ts-webserver::codeinfra:providers:aws::default_3_38_1::57baf899-740a-486a-908e-43cf27cce182]
      ~ userData: 
            #!/bin/bash
          - echo "Hello, World!" > index.html
          + echo "Hello, Codeinfra!" > index.html
            nohup python -m SimpleHTTPServer 80 &
    --aws:ec2/instance:Instance: (delete-replaced)
        [id=i-0207dc7a2d8c5135a]
        [urn=urn:codeinfra:dev::aws-ts-webserver::aws:ec2/instance:Instance::web-server-www]
        [provider=urn:codeinfra:dev::aws-ts-webserver::codeinfra:providers:aws::default_3_38_1::57baf899-740a-486a-908e-43cf27cce182]
